blocks.text:
**Analyzing expected impact**

I expect no detectable impact since coverage is limited to session timeline signals only, which addresses all three aspects. I didn’t detect any issues with auth_security. As for layer_file_changes, it might be an empty array, or it could contain one entry for the presentation layer, but I'd hate to make guesses. So, I'll stick with an empty array to be on the safe side, mentioning there are no concrete layer-level changes due to the absence of file_changes.
